recent_excerpts: Mirai botnet operators exploit CVE-2025-29635, a CVSS 8.8 command injection flaw in end-of-life D-Link DIR-823X routers, to deploy malware and launch DDoS attacks.
CVE-2026-5057, with a CVSS score of 7.5, exposes ATEN Unizon to unauthenticated denial-of-service attacks via its RPC service, allowing remote attackers to crash the device management platform.
A stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability (CVE-2026-4682) in the HP DeskJet 2855e printer allows network-adjacent attackers to execute arbitrary code without authentication, earning a CVSS score of
